description_short: Designed for long hours of sitting, this seat cushion offers pressure relief, posture support, and a contoured shape that keeps you aligned.

construction_layers.name: Premium Memory Foam
construction_layers.notes: Contours to body shape; U-cutout for tailbone pressure relief.

proprietary_tech.name: U-Cutout Design
proprietary_tech.description: Eases tailbone/coccyx pressure during long sits.

faq_specs.question: Can these seat cushions improve posture?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, the ergonomic design supports your tailbone and hips for better sitting posture.

notes_observed: Height 127mm — schema may have mis-reported. Foam layer is 50mm/2in; total cushion likely closer to 75mm. Verify on compare page.
